steps.title: Identify the purpose
steps.content: The passage opens with the fact that handshakes create trust and states the team's goal: to improve human-robot interactions through a robot handshake. The key signal is this link—they're trying to replicate the trust-building effect of real handshakes.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice A states the direct outcome: lifelike handshakes result in people feeling more comfortable interacting with robots. The other three propose unrelated explanations—difficulty to program, visual appearance, or other purposes. That matches choice A — A is correct.
